title: サマースプリントシリーズ制覇！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The award ceremony comes as suddenly as the
competition.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Commendation! You've conquered the Summer
Sprint Series!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In summary! With her trainer's guidance, Curren
Chan placed first in...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The Hakodate Sprint Stakes, the Keeneland Cup,
and the Centaur Stakes of the Summer Sprint
Series!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Shining as the queen of the sprint, she has made
this Summer's Sprint tour another exciting one!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid indeed! As the director of Tracen
Academy, I both appreciate and applaud your
achievements!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: That is all! Awards ceremony over! Applause!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So the good thing Director Akikawa mentioned
might happen if I won the Summer Sprint Series
was an award! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I tried so hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And one other thing...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um... Since we're here, I was just wondering...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Would it be okay if I took a picture with you?
And can I have your permission to post it on
Umastagram? ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Granted! Post it wherever you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay, here we go. Strike a pose! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Freeze!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I think a slightly different angle would
look better. Like so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan continues to lecture the director on
how to be popular on social media even after the
award ceremony ends. Before I know what's
happening...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, that should do it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to work with you more on the "Charms
of Tracen Academy, Featuring Curren Chan ♪"
project! Can you handle the rest?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Understood! I'll pass on the word to Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll do the very best promotion I can!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...For both our sakes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ambitious as ever, Curren Chan takes up a new
project.
